pack.icp: Freelance designers with 3-20 recurring clients who spend more than 2 hours per month chasing overdue invoices.
pack.wtp: A direct quote says they would pay to avoid awkward follow-ups.
pack.competitor_gap: Invoice trackers send generic reminders and do not adapt tone for client relationships.
pack.positioning: A helpful tool that makes work easier.
pack.outreach: I saw designers discussing awkward invoice follow-ups. I am testing relationship-aware reminders; would 10 minutes of feedback be useful? Reply stop if not relevant.
pack.landing: Relationship-aware invoice reminders for freelance designers with recurring clients.
pack.roadmap: Day 1: interview 5 designers. Day 2: compare reminder tools. Day 3: test $19/mo. Day 4: run landing copy. Day 5-6: collect replies. Day 7: decide.
